originalTitle: Man reportedly shot at Kenya protest against US Ebola quarantine centre
title: Man reportedly shot at Kenya protest against US Ebola quarantine centre
content: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.

originalTitle: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan
title: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan
content: Somali referee Omar Artan says he was subjected to an 11-hour immigration interview before being denied entry to the United States for the World Cup despite holding the "right papers" and "right visa".

originalTitle: Who is the Somali referee barred from entering the US for the World Cup?
title: Who is the Somali referee barred from entering the US for the World Cup?
content: Omar Artan was set to become the first Somali to referee a game at the World Cup finals, but his place in history has been denied by US immigration authorities.

originalTitle: Trump vows retaliation after claiming Iran shot down Apache helicopter
title: Trump vows retaliation after claiming Iran shot down Apache helicopter
content: President Trump accused Iran of shooting down a US Apache helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz

originalTitle: Israeli forces kill nine in Tyre after issuing forced displacement orders
title: Israeli forces kill nine in Tyre after issuing forced displacement orders
content: Israeli forces killed nine people in Tyre in the past 24 hours after it issued forced displacement orders on the city.

originalTitle: Canada confirms opening of Gordie Howe Bridge, despite Trump’s threats
title: Canada confirms opening of Gordie Howe Bridge, despite Trump’s threats
content: Trump had threatened to halt the opening of the cross-border bridge, which is jointly owned by Michigan and Canada.

originalTitle: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
content: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.

originalTitle: US striking Iran in response to downing of helicopter, military says
title: US striking Iran in response to downing of helicopter, military says
content: President Donald Trump earlier accused Iran of shooting down the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to respond.

originalTitle: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
content: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.

originalTitle: Caution over Saka as Tuchel says England must dare to dream
title: Caution over Saka as Tuchel says England must dare to dream
content: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says Bukayo Saka's fitness is being managed with a "little bit of care" heading into the World Cup.

originalTitle: Does referee case show Fifa has lost control of its own World Cup?
title: Does referee case show Fifa has lost control of its own World Cup?
content: With referee Omar Artan denied entry to the United States and worries over staff and supporters being turned back, what does this tell us about the World Cup?

originalTitle: Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
title: Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
content: The decision followed a safeguarding investigation opened by the the Football Association.
